name: Margarita Shrimp with Fettuccine
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix shrimp, tequila, and lemon juice in a medium bowl. Cover and refrigerate for 2 hours.
2. Drain the shrimp.
3. Whisk eggs and water in a medium bowl. Season with salt and pepper.
4. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Dip shrimp into egg mixture, then into flour; shake off excess. Place shrimp in skillet and sauté until pink and cooked through, about 2 minutes per side. Transfer shrimp to a plate lined with paper towels and drain. Discard oil.
5. In the same skillet, melt 1/4 cup butter over medium heat. Add lemon slices and green onions and sauté for 3 minutes. Add ginger and garlic and sauté for 2 minutes. Stir in flour. Gradually mix in wine; boil until reduced to glaze, about 2 minutes. Add remaining butter and whisk until melted. Discard lemon zest.
6. Return shrimp to skillet and heat through.
7. Meanwhile, cook pasta in salted water. Drain. Divide pasta between plates. Top with shrimp. Pour sauce over. Sprinkle with dill and serve.
